description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and release. The build job runs on a matrix of Windows and Ubuntu environments with different architectures and Qt versions, checks out the repository, installs Qt and dependencies, configures CMake, builds the project, runs tests, and creates an installer. The release job runs on Ubuntu, checks if it's a deployment build, downloads installers, and creates a release with artifacts.
